blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the seasonal adjustment functionality.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of seasonal adjustment (hiding less during slow periods), but the evidence provided does not confirm the implementation of this feature. While the use case describes a scenario where the coach reduces hiding to 10% during December, there is no concrete evidence of the algorithm's functionality or its ability to adjust hiding based on seasonal demand. This lack of direct evidence leads to a conclusion of a gap in requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of the algorithm's implementation or its ability to adjust hiding based on seasonal demand.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the seasonal adjustment functionality.
